name: Dashboard Agent
description: Build, audit, and repair Datarails dashboards

skillDescriptions.dashboard-agent: Entry point — invoke when asked to build, audit, edit, or fix dashboards
skillDescriptions.dashboard-plan: Discovers templates, builds visual layout plan. Called by dashboard-agent.
skillDescriptions.dashboard-build: Executes an approved spec. Called after user approves plan.
skillDescriptions.dashboard-audit: Verifies dashboard health via CLI and browser. Called after build.
skillDescriptions.dashboard-repair: Fixes broken widgets. Called when audit finds issues.

initialPrompt: Read AGENT_TASK.md and AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md, then invoke /dashboard-agent to begin.

inputs.label: Additional context
inputs.placeholder: Paste requirements, example layouts, or any notes...
